model.description: Canon's exact model designator, e.g. TS3520, MF644Cdw, PRO-300.

aliases.description: Alternate names the tool should match against.

supportUrl.description: Canon's official support / download page. Must be on a Canon domain.

driverUrl.description: Direct HTTPS URL to the Canon driver installer. Must be on canon.com or c-wss.com. Leave empty if unknown.

sha256.description: SHA256 of the installer, if Canon publishes one. Empty string if unknown.

verified.description: True only when a maintainer has verified driverUrl is current and correct.
